Python is a high-level programming language known for its simplicity and readability.
Python is great for beginners and used in web development, data science, and AI.
Python was created by Guido van Rossum and first released in 1991.
Python supports multiple programming paradigms and has a vast library ecosystem.
AI stands for Artificial Intelligence, which enables machines to perform tasks that typically require human intelligence.
AI includes machine learning, natural language processing, and computer vision.
Machine learning is a subset of AI that allows systems to learn from data.
Deep learning uses neural networks to solve complex problems.
I can help with general questions about Python, AI, and more. Just ask!
